name: Family-Favorite Oatmeal (Lf)
recipeIngredient: 1 medium to large apple at room temp
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the oatmeal by boiling water and stirring in oats until cooked.
2. Cut the oatmeal into small chunks.
3. Add brown sugar, raisins, cinnamon, and chopped walnuts to the oatmeal.
4. Slice or chop the apple and add it to the mixture.
5. Mix everything together well.
6. Turn off heat when ready.
